translation.content: Back on deck and just about recovered from a big week in Miami, Bill's exclusive mix features new tracks from Âme, Junion, Baby Ford & Zip, as well as the lush Duplex on Clone. Its looking like a busy summer for the bots, as We Are Robotos launch their record label and forthcoming CD out in October through Kompakt. Bill will be back in Ibiza this summer, so look out for dates at DC10 as well as a wider European tour with Nick AC to promote the label and CD. You can more of Bill each week on Robot Radio every Thursday on East Village Radio (EVR) from 6pm-9pm EST (11pm-1am GMT). RA had a minimal exchange with Bill about the mix... What have you been up to recently? DJing, afterhours, scarf shopping. Where was the mix recorded? It was done live in NYC with two decks, two CDJ's, one Allen & Heath XOne 92, a pack of parliments, one vitamin water, and no computers. What are you up to next? Detox.
translation.blurb: The seventh chapter of our Podcast comes from RA columnist Bill Patrick.
